page.content: The first table presents data on microsatellite markers, detailing the microsatellite marker name, chromosome, allelic size range in base pairs, number of alleles per locus (A), PCR positivity, and heterozygosity (HE). For the marker TA1, located on chromosome 6, the allelic size range is 74–190 bp, with 4 alleles, 60% PCR positivity, and HE of 0.650. Polyα, on chromosome 4, shows an allelic size range of 138–180 bp, 5 alleles, 65% PCR positivity, and HE of 0.687.

Laryngeal surface of epiglottis, 2 arytenoid cartilages and 2 pseudo-folds
Laryngeal surface of epiglottis and 2 arytenoid cartilages
Scar after epiglittis and 2 aryepiglottic folds

page.content: PfPk2, on chromosome 12, has an allelic size range of 160–192 bp, 3 alleles, 64% PCR positivity, and HE of 0.531. TA109, on chromosome 6, has an allelic size range of 188–200 bp, with 2 alleles, 62% PCR positivity, and HE of 0.550. The marker 2490, located on chromosome 10, has an allelic size range of 80–84 bp, 2 alleles, 60% PCR positivity, and HE of 0.469. C2M33, on chromosome 2, has an allelic size range of 140–228 bp, 5 alleles, 64% PCR positivity, and HE of 0.256. Lastly, C3M69, located on chromosome 3, has an allelic size range of 122–138 bp, 5 alleles, 65% PCR positivity, and HE of 0.636. The second table outlines types of neoglottis and phonation closure, with the header indicating the number of cases. One vocal fold and epiglottis accounted for 7 cases, laryngeal surface of epiglottis, 2 arytenoid cartilages and 2 pseudo-folds also accounted for 7 cases, while laryngeal surface of epiglottis and 2 arytenoid cartilages accounted for 1 case. Scar after epiglottis and 2 aryepiglottic folds accounted for 2 cases, and pseudo vocal folds represented 1 case, while pseudo-folds without arytenoid cartilages accounted for 2 cases.
